name: Prinsha Shrestha
profileSummary: Prinsha Shrestha is a Nepalese model and beauty pageant titleholder was the first runner-up of Miss Nepal 2014. She then represented Nepal at Miss Earth 2014. Later, Prinsha Shrestha participated in Miss Eco Queen 2015 without The Hidden Treasure's consent. On April 5, 2015, Shrestha's title was revoked due to her bad conduct in participating in an international pageant without The Hidden Treasure's knowledge.
